A

ACTIVE - Enum constant in enum class jsim.api.GamePieceState.Lifecycle
Game piece is actively moving.

The angular velocity of the game piece.
applyMagnusEffect() - Method in class jsim.api.GamePiecePhysics
Applies the Magnus effect to the game piece trajectory.
availableYears() - Static method in class jsim.field.FieldDefinitionCatalog
Returns available built-in season years bundled with the vendordep.

createBody(double) - Method in class jsim.PhysicsWorld
Creates a new body with the provided mass in kilograms.
createBody(long, double) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Creates a body in the given world and returns its native index.
createRobot(RobotID, Translation2d[]) - Static method in class jsim.api.SimRobot
Initializes a new robot via the unified StateManager tracking system.
createWorld(double, boolean) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Creates a native world handle.

DEPOT - Enum constant in enum class jsim.field.FieldElement.Type

destroyWorld(long) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI

equals(Object) - Method in record class jsim.Vec3

F

FieldConfig - Class in jsim.field
Single JSON per season config parser mapping.
FieldConfig() - Constructor for class jsim.field.FieldConfig
Creates a new empty FieldConfig with no field elements.
FieldDefinitionCatalog - Class in jsim.field
Built-in field definition catalog for vendordep runtime usage.
FieldElement - Class in jsim.field
Basic block of the JSim environment (HUB, DEPOT, HP_STATION).
FieldElement() - Constructor for class jsim.field.FieldElement
 
FieldElement.Type - Enum Class in jsim.field
Enum representing the type of field element.
fieldElements - Variable in class jsim.field.FieldConfig
Array of field elements in this configuration.
FieldState<T> - Class in jsim.api
A Read/Write proxy wrapper safeguarding underlying JSim state data.
FieldState(T) - Constructor for class jsim.api.FieldState
Creates a new FieldState wrapper with the given state.
forceLoad() - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Forces the native library to load.

Implementation of 2026 Game Piece Physics bounds.
Fuel2026() - Constructor for class jsim.api.gamepieces.Fuel2026

GamePiecePhysics - Class in jsim.api
Underlying physics state matching standard trajectory model for FlyingGamePiece.

GamePieceState - Class in jsim.api
Tracks the lifecycle and data of a standard game piece in the simulation.
GamePieceState(GamePiecePhysics) - Constructor for class jsim.api.GamePieceState
Creates a new GamePieceState with the specified physics type.
GamePieceState.Lifecycle - Enum Class in jsim.api
Enum representing the lifecycle state of a game piece.
get() - Method in class jsim.api.FieldState
Safely reads the snapshot of the state.
getBodyLinearVelocity(int) - Method in class jsim.PhysicsWorld
Gets the world linear velocity for the given body.
getBodyLinearVelocity(long, int, double[]) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Reads a body's linear velocity into outVxyzMps.
getBodyLinearVelocityArray(int) - Method in class jsim.PhysicsWorld
Gets the world linear velocity for the given body.
getBodyPose7Array(long, double[]) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Exports flattened body poses as [x, y, z, qw, qx, qy, qz] blocks.
getBodyPosition(int) - Method in class jsim.PhysicsWorld
Gets the world position for the given body.
getBodyPosition(long, int, double[]) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Reads a body's position into outXyzMeters.
getBodyPositionArray(int) - Method in class jsim.PhysicsWorld
Gets the world position for the given body.
getBodyState13Array(double[]) - Method in class jsim.PhysicsWorld
Exports full body state blocks.
getBodyState13Array(long, double[]) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Exports flattened full body state as [x, y, z, qw, qx, qy, qz, vx, vy, vz, wx, wy, wz] blocks.
getBodyVelocity6Array(long, double[]) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Exports flattened body velocities as [vx, vy, vz, wx, wy, wz] blocks.
getExtractOnStaticLoad() - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI.Helper
Returns whether the driver loads during static initialization.

Gets the singleton instance of the StateManager.
getPose() - Method in class jsim.api.SimRobot
Retrieves the current field-relative odometry pose.
getRobotID() - Method in class jsim.api.SimRobot
Gets the RobotID for this robot.

initialize() - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Initializes the native driver.
initializeField(FieldConfig) - Method in class jsim.api.StateManager
Loads JSON field definition and builds all FieldElements and collision zones.

Creates a robot instance, assigns starting pose, and registers it in the simulation.

Defines valid interaction volume for intake.
INTERACTING - Enum constant in enum class jsim.api.GamePieceState.Lifecycle

JNI entry points for the vendor physics driver.
JSimJNI.Helper - Class in jsim.jni
Configures whether the native library is loaded during static initialization.

Gets the current world-space linear velocity in meters per second.

Loads a built-in field definition JSON for a season year.

Loads a built-in field definition as a parsed JsonNode.

Handle for a body managed by PhysicsWorld.
PhysicsWorld - Class in jsim
Thin Java wrapper around the native physics world implementation.

Creates a native physics world.

Executes placing the piece onto a branch node.
pose - Variable in class jsim.api.SimRobot.RobotState
The current field-relative pose of the robot.
position - Variable in class jsim.api.GamePieceState
The current 3D position of this game piece.
position - Variable in class jsim.field.FieldElement
The 3D position of this field element.
position() - Method in class jsim.PhysicsBody
Gets the current world-space position in meters.
positionArray() - Method in class jsim.PhysicsBody
Gets the current world-space position in meters.
publishFrame() - Method in class jsim.nt.WorldPosePublisher
Pulls world state from JNI and publishes one frame.

Hard overrides the state manager's simulation pose for this robot.
RESOLVED - Enum constant in enum class jsim.api.GamePieceState.Lifecycle
Game piece interaction has been resolved.
RobotID - Enum Class in jsim.api
Enum representing the standardized FRC driver station identifiers for robots.

S

season - Variable in class jsim.field.FieldConfig
The game season associated with this field configuration.
setBodyAerodynamicBox(long, int, double, double, double, double) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Assigns box aerodynamic geometry to a body (useful for robot CAD components).
setBodyAerodynamicSphere(long, int, double, double) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Assigns sphere aerodynamic geometry to a body (useful for game pieces from CAD).
setBodyCollisionFilter(long, int, int, int) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Sets collision layer and mask filters for this body.
setBodyGravityEnabled(long, int, boolean) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Enables or disables gravity for a body.
setBodyLinearVelocity(long, int, double, double, double) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Sets a body's linear velocity in meters per second.
setBodyMaterial(long, int, double, double, double, double) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Sets per-body material contact properties.
setBodyMaterialId(long, int, int) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Sets numeric material identifier used by world material-interaction tables.
setBodyPosition(long, int, double, double, double) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Sets a body's position in meters.
setChassisSpeeds(ChassisSpeeds) - Method in class jsim.api.SimRobot
Applies commanded speeds to the physics solver.
setExtractOnStaticLoad(boolean) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI.Helper
Sets whether the driver loads during static initialization.
setGravity(double, double, double) - Method in class jsim.PhysicsWorld
Applies gravity components to the world.
setGravity(Vec3) - Method in class jsim.PhysicsWorld
Applies a gravity vector to the world.
setGravityEnabled(boolean) - Method in class jsim.PhysicsBody
Enables or disables gravity for this body.
setLinearVelocity(double, double, double) - Method in class jsim.PhysicsBody
Sets the body's linear velocity in meters per second.
setLinearVelocity(Vec3) - Method in class jsim.PhysicsBody
Sets the body's linear velocity in meters per second.
setMaterialInteraction(long, int, int, double, double, boolean) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Sets per-material-pair contact interaction overrides.
setPosition(double, double, double) - Method in class jsim.PhysicsBody
Sets the body's world-space position in meters.
setPosition(Vec3) - Method in class jsim.PhysicsBody
Sets the body's world-space position in meters.
setWorldAerodynamics(long, boolean, double, double, double, double, double) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Configures world-level aerodynamics parameters.
setWorldGravity(long, double, double, double) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Sets the world's gravity vector in meters per second squared.
shoot(Translation3d, double, Rotation3d) - Method in class jsim.api.gamepieces.Fuel2026
Executes a physical shot.
SimRobot - Class in jsim.api
External interface for simulated FRC Robots interacting with JSim.
SimRobot(RobotID, FieldState<SimRobot.RobotState>) - Constructor for class jsim.api.SimRobot
Protected constructor.
SimRobot.RobotState - Class in jsim.api
Internal state for a simulated robot, including pose and speeds.
spawn(Rotation3d, Translation3d, Translation2d) - Static method in class jsim.api.GamePieceState
Ejects/spawns a piece based on parameters mapping.
SPAWNED - Enum constant in enum class jsim.api.GamePieceState.Lifecycle
Game piece has been spawned.
speeds - Variable in class jsim.api.SimRobot.RobotState
The current chassis speeds of the robot.
StateManager - Class in jsim.api
System Rules: - Single source of truth for all simulation state.
step() - Method in class jsim.PhysicsWorld
Advances the simulation by one step.
step(int) - Method in class jsim.PhysicsWorld
Advances the simulation by the requested number of steps.
stepWorld(long, int) - Static method in class jsim.jni.JSimJNI
Advances the world by the given number of steps.

Vec3 - Record Class in jsim
Immutable 3D vector used for positions, velocities, and accelerations.
Vec3(double, double, double) - Constructor for record class jsim.Vec3

Publishes JSim body state to NetworkTables in AdvantageScope-friendly formats.
